content_to_dict.description: Dictionary mapping canonical compound IDs to raw assay values.

content_to_multi_assay_dict.description: Nested dictionary mapping requested assay names to canonical compound-ID/value dictionaries.

get_compound_id_from_description.description: Single-field JSON object containing the final normalized compound ID or the string None.

resolve_compound_id_alias.description: Single-field JSON object containing the allowlist-resolved canonical compound ID or the string None.
